name: tampermonkey-teams-saved-extension
description: Microsoft Teams の「保存済み」に Slack 風の「完了」「アーカイブ」タブを追加する Tampermonkey スクリプト

scripts.lint: bun run eslint ; bun run prettier
scripts.prettier: prettier teams-saved-extension.user.js > /dev/null && echo 'Prettier: No issues found' || echo 'Prettier: Issues found'
scripts.fix: bun run eslint:fix && bun run prettier:fix

author: aiya000
